channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Canada and Morocco Set for High-Stakes World Cup Clash as Both Teams Continue Historic Runs
item.description: Canada faces Morocco in a crucial Round of 16 clash at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, marking their most challenging opponent yet. Morocco has dominated African football with a 33-game unbeaten streak, beco...

item.title: Tanzania's Shilling Strengthens Due to Gold and Tourism Growth
item.description: Tanzania's shilling has shown significant resilience against major foreign currencies, driven by robust performance in the gold sector and sustained growth in tourism revenues. Economic analysts attri...

item.title: Kenya's Infrastructure Boost Through Stake Sales and National Fund
item.description: Deputy President Kithure Kindiki has defended the sale of stakes in government agencies to fund critical infrastructure projects, emphasizing that the proceeds will be channeled into the National Infr...

item.title: Rite Foods, JAMB, and FG Collaborate on N35m Scholarship Initiative for Top Students
item.description: Rite Foods Limited has been commended by the federal government and Joint Admissions and Matriculation Board (JAMB) for awarding N35 million in scholarships to seven outstanding UTME candidates. The i...

item.title: Los Angeles City Council Approves Non-Citizen Voting and Police Oversight Measures for Ballot
item.description: The Los Angeles City Council has approved placing non-citizen voting and police oversight measures on the November 2026 ballot, sparking intense debate over the timing and implications. Advocates argu...

item.title: Ryan Bang donates 15 years of savings to staff and funds earthquake relief for Mindanao school
item.description: Actor Ryan Bang recently marked his birthday by making a significant charitable gesture, donating 15 years' worth of savings to his longtime staff members. Additionally, he contributed to the reconstr...

item.title: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Reign Me In' Ties with Wet Wet Wet's Record as UK's Longest-Running Number One
item.description: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's track 'Reign Me In' has achieved a historic milestone by tying with Wet Wet Wet's record as the UK's longest-running Number One single. The song, which first topped the ch...

item.title: Alleged fake federal agency scandal exposes gaps in Nigeria’s government and parliamentary oversight
item.description: The report exposes a major governance controversy in Nigeria involving a supposed fake Presidential Foreign Intervention Promotion Council (PFIPC) and Presidential Economic Advisory Council allegedly ...

item.title: Sundowns secure Ndlovu after Pirates competition
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns have successfully signed Siyanda Ndlovu, a 23-year-old winger from Golden Arrows, after outmaneuvering rival Orlando Pirates. The transfer, finalized on July 4, 2026, ends months of ...

item.title: Gina Lollobrigida's Rise to Stardom Through the 1947 Miss Italia Pageant
item.description: The article details Gina Lollobrigida's participation in the historic 1947 Miss Italia beauty pageant held in Stresa, Italy. At just 20 years old, she competed in this iconic event that launched caree...

item.title: Metallica Deliver Epic Set at London Stadium During 'No Repeats' Tour
item.description: Metallica delivered a career-spanning performance at the first of their two 'no repeats' shows at London Stadium, marking the conclusion of their UK and Ireland leg of the 'M72' world tour. The band, ...

item.title: Mexico's Kidnapping Crisis and the Challenge of Hosting the World Cup
item.description: As England prepares to face Mexico in the FIFA World Cup, a parallel crisis unfolds in the country's streets. Over 130,000 people have been forcibly disappeared since 2006, with cartel violence escala...

item.title: Proposed ATF rule could boost online gun sales and impact firearm regulations
item.description: The Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) has proposed a rule change that would allow licensed dealers to ship firearms directly to in-state residents after online identity verific...

item.title: Canada’s new military tanker completes first flight as part of $3.6B fleet modernization
item.description: Canada’s first new military tanker has successfully completed its first flight, marking a significant milestone in the $3.6 billion fleet renewal program. The event, which took place on July 4, 2026, ...

item.title: Teen Arrested for Allegedly Enticing Minors Online via Roblox
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) has arrested a teenager in Pampanga over allegations of attempting to entice minors through the online platform Roblox. According to reports, the suspect is ...

item.title: Critics condemn Trump's impact on American patriotism during July 4 celebrations
item.description: The article reflects on the contrast between the patriotic spirit of the 1976 bicentennial and the current political climate, where former President Donald Trump has become inextricably linked with na...

item.title: Two Brothers Charged with Land Fraud by EFCC
item.description: The Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) has charged two brothers with fraud for allegedly reselling the same piece of land to multiple buyers. The case stems from a petition filed by Mr. N...

item.title: July Fourth Fireworks Cause Hazardous Air Quality in Southern California
item.description: Fireworks celebrations on July 4th are expected to significantly degrade air quality across Southern California, with hazardous pollution levels anticipated from Saturday evening through Sunday aftern...

item.title: India's evolving career landscape: Beyond traditional paths
item.description: The article explores the shifting career aspirations in India, moving away from traditional fields like medicine and engineering toward diverse opportunities. It highlights factors such as economic pr...

item.title: TMC faces leadership crisis as Chandrima Bhattacharya resigns amid internal rebellion
item.description: Chandrima Bhattacharya, the newly appointed state president of the Trinamool Congress (TMC) in West Bengal, has resigned from her post just a month after taking charge. Her resignation comes amid grow...
